title: IronClad Heavy Duty Rock Slider Side Steps
description_html:
Protect your rocker panels on the toughest trails with IronClad heavy-duty rock sliders. Fabricated from 3/16-inch DOM steel tube, these sliders double as rock-solid step rails for easy cab entry. Powder-coated black for long-lasting corrosion resistance.

Designed for serious off-road use. Features integrated step pads, 3,000 lb rated, and bolt-on installation. No welding required.
